title: Proof Card 001 - Customer Support Reply Workflow
goal: Improve customer support replies for GoalOS digital-product buyers.
workflowBefore: A polite but generic AI reply that may miss access/refund classification and escalation needs.
workflowAfter: A structured reply workflow that classifies the request, drafts a clear response, flags risk, and produces a reusable support playbook.
publicShareLine: GoalOS turns AI work into proof: one support workflow improves, proof validates it, reputation compounds it.
